data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commit 950d194bf6e3 is on main, (2) min-w-[20ch] applied to both SearchBarInner form and Suspense fallback in search-bar.tsx, (3) app-header.tsx flex-wrap layout preserved with order-3/basis-full for mobile wrapping, (4) layout contract test covers the new class contract (7/7 passing), (5) no invariants to check, (6) only search-bar.tsx and beats-page-layout.test.ts modified — no unrelated changes.
